text: Telvar. The Veneficturis gates close at dusk—walk with me while we still have light.
speaker: Myramar

text: Your father thinks coin will keep you safe in Secundus. What do you believe will?
speaker: Myramar

choices.text: Cleverness—reading the city before it reads me.
Luck—and a fast pair of boots.

text: Good. The Test of Fire will not care what you wish were true—only what you can hold when the heat arrives.
speaker: Myramar

text: Rest tonight. Tomorrow we begin the lesson you will not forget.
speaker: Myramar
